raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I am filing a complaint regarding Citibanks failure to release a {$9000.00} refund that was issued by XXXX XXXX and credited to our Citibank credit card account. Despite multiple calls and confirmations from the merchant, Citibank has not released these funds to us, and we have received inconsistent and inaccurate information each time weve contacted them. 

Summary of the Issue Refund amount : {$9000.00} Merchant : XXXX XXXX Reason for refund : Two airline tickets purchased and subsequently refunded by XXXX XXXX  XXXX issued refund : XX/XX/year> Credit posted to Citibank account : XX/XX/year> Timeline and Attempts to Resolve Once we saw that our refund credit was on our credit card, we first contacted Citibank on XX/XX/year>, and have since called approximately five times regarding this matter. Each time, we were given different and contradictory explanations : That the dispute was still open this is false ; XXXX has confirmed the refund was issued and the dispute closed. 

That Citibanks investigation team needed to review the refund because of its size this has already been verified by the merchant.

That the disputes are closed, but Citibank must now start a new investigation before releasing funds which makes no logical sense. 

We have written documentation from XXXX confirming the refund has been processed in full. Citibank has acknowledged the credit on our account but has failed to transfer or release the funds to us. 

Ongoing Concern After a month of repeated calls and no progress, this situation has begun to feel deceptive and potentially improper. Citibank is holding funds that do not belong to them, providing circular and inconsistent explanations, and offering no clear path to resolution. 

We respectfully request the CFPBs assistance in ensuring that Citibank : Confirms receipt of the {$9000.00} refund from XXXX. 

Releases those funds to our account immediately. 

Provides a clear written explanation for the delay and mishandling of this refund. 

We have all supporting documentation from XXXX and are happy to provide it upon request. 

Thank you for your attention and assistance. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
